problem id: 54b895c1
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(2) XOR NOT SHL(4)) OR SHR(2)

examples:
  11011011 -> 00110110
  10011101 -> 01111111
  11000001 -> 11111000
  00101011 -> 11101011
  10100101 -> 00111001
  01111011 -> 10111110
  01111001 -> 10011110
  00010001 -> 10101111

query: 00000101
predicted answer: 10111011
